{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323145231C6FE3928C5C510B2378D"}"},"total":88},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7138382281160770336","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书写的很好，一口气看完，有笑点，有热血，情节很好，猪脚性格不错，质量还可以，就是不够看啊。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1662034247,"group_id":"7131644824670702592","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6BA0MT+ZUPI1xxFVpIujbZDdTK3aXh8+XnBX1PBw2+k","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2608458695206318","user_name":"长歌落日元"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2608458695206318","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1698751381,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7131644824670702592","book_info":{"abstract":"【全书无刀+杀伐果断+半无敌升级流+爽文+情绪管理系统】
书名：《无限复制异能的我，杀穿天下》《我能无限复制异能，让校花倒追我》
诡异复苏，妖魔鬼怪横行，人类岌岌可危 ，只能躲在夹缝中生存。
有人依靠强大异能和意志守护华夏，守护人类！
而苏寒穿越到蓝星，不但觉醒SSSS复写眼，而且获得情绪管理系统，甚至灵魂深处住着一个主神大佬灵魂体。
“卧槽！苏寒竟然觉醒了两系异能？三系异能？四系异能？......”
“你他马，苏寒杀鬼如切菜，恐怖如斯！”
“苏寒的身体居然如此坚硬，我的武器不堪一击......”
“......”
若干年后，苏寒进入四大高等界面，一路斩杀各种神人、主神，就像一尊战神。
主神们：太可怕了，简直无敌！
五爪金龙主神：恭迎主人归来！
混沌之主：我拥有不死不灭金身，你竟然能杀死我，这...怎么可能！
